task: Change writeContentType in render/render.go to take the content type as a single string instead of a []string slice.
Swap the parameter order of assert1 in utils.go so the text comes first and the guard condition second.
Make nameOfFunction in utils.go also return an error as a second return value (nil when the name was resolved).
Change debugPrint in debug.go to take an io.Writer as its first parameter and write to it instead of DefaultWriter; existing callers should pass DefaultWriter.
